# teams app rsc remove

Remove an RSC permission from an app

## Usage

```
teams app rsc remove <teamsAppId> <permission> [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `teamsAppId` | Teams app ID | Yes |
| `permission` | RSC permission name (e.g. ChannelMessage.Read.Group) | Yes |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
